hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $input | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 $env:TEMP\xinyu_hook_in.json; $j = Get-Content $env:TEMP\xinyu_hook_in.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $j.tool_input.command; if (-not $cmd) { exit 0 }; if ($cmd -match 'sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}' -or $cmd -match 'AKID[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}') { Write-Error '[xinyu-guard] 命令中疑似包含 API 密钥（DeepSeek sk-... 或 腾讯 AKID...）。绝不要把密钥直接放进命令行/历史。请改用 .env 文件。'; exit 2 }; if ($cmd -match 'git\s+push\s+.*--force' -or $cmd -match 'git\s+push\s+.*-f($|\s)') { Write-Error '[xinyu-guard] 检测到 git push --force。这会覆写远程历史，可能丢失协作者的提交。如果确定要做，请在对话中明确告诉用户后再用 --force-with-lease。'; exit 2 }; exit 0"
